LanguageData.Bushcraft_DesignatorZoneDesc: Designate a land area where colonists can forage, track, trap, and gather modest survival resources.
LanguageData.Bushcraft_CannotPlaceZone: Must be placed on walkable land.
LanguageData.Bushcraft_ManhunterMessage: {0} was disturbed by bushcrafting and has become manhunter.
